title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BikeDekho - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BikeDekho - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BikeDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BikeDekho:
BikeDekho is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho!
